creator: dfilter@FreeBSD.ORG
text:
jadawin     2008-03-26 15:17:28 UTC

  FreeBSD ports repository

  Modified files:
    security/fakeroot    Makefile distinfo pkg-plist 
  Added files:
    security/fakeroot/files patch-doc.diff 
  Log:
  - Update to 1.9.3
  - Use TCP for IPC (as advised in the INSTALL file)
  - Replace INSTALLS_SHLIB by USE_LDCONFIG
  - New manpage (nl)
  - Removed Debian-related stuff in manpages
  - Pass maintainership to submitter
  
  PR:             ports/121833
  Submitted by:   Ganael Laplanche <ganael.laplanche@martymac.com>
  Approved by:    thierry (mentor)
  
  Revision  Changes    Path
  1.15      +15 -6     ports/security/fakeroot/Makefile
  1.8       +3 -3      ports/security/fakeroot/distinfo
  1.1       +107 -0    ports/security/fakeroot/files/patch-doc.diff (new)
  1.8       +1 -0      ports/security/fakeroot/pkg-plist
